title: fagraea fagraeacea
intro: Fagraea fagraeacea, also known as the 'fragrant frangipani', is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae. The medicinal properties of Fagraea fagraeacea are attributed to its leaves, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and promoting a good night's sleep.
